'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=NPCd0cq0RPIZSgeuFY3Lh5.PwufTmlog8JgpettofNU-1775420043-1.0.1.1-oQGXwYEvj3SKy85Els1Tj043q7m93V2DixhaLLQ_gRM"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
